evaluators.name: Cheapest Family Night Session for 2 Adults & 2 Children Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added session tickets for a Family Night between Dec 10–20 starting 5–7 pm for exactly 2 adults and 2 children, and that the chosen session is the cheapest option for that family size within the criteria.

evaluators.name: Family Itinerary with Santa, Light Show, and Indoor Craft on Dec 18 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the Dec 18 itinerary includes one family-friendly Santa experience, one light show, and one indoor craft workshop between 4–8 pm.

evaluators.name: Accessibility Inquiry about Wheelchair Reservation at Main Entrance Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user submitted an accessibility-page message under the Accessibility & Mobility topic asking about wheelchair reservation at the main accessible entrance, including entrance name and a request about reservations.

evaluators.name: Next Saturday Sensory-Friendly Morning Session 1 Adult + 1 Child, No Add-ons Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked 1 adult and 1 child ticket with no add-ons for the earliest qualifying Saturday sensory-friendly morning session starting before 10:00 am with child price at or under $15.

evaluators.name: Friday After-8pm Group Booking for 15 with Discount and Pay-on-Arrival/Invoice Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a group booking for 15 people on a Friday after 8:00 pm using a discounted group option that supports pay-on-arrival or invoice, and that the chosen option is the cheapest among such valid options.

evaluators.name: Holiday Newsletter Weekly Subscription with Family Activities & Special Offers Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a weekly newsletter subscription selecting only the Family Activities and Special Offers & Discounts interests, with a valid email.

evaluators.name: Choose Correct Adult Ticket Type Based on Free Drink and Price Cap Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added two adult tickets for the correct choice between a standard ticket and a free-drink upgraded ticket, subject to the $120 total cap.

evaluators.name: Transit Route Last Departure Time Inquiry Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user identified a suitable bus route (<=10-minute walk, runs until at least 10:00 pm) and sent a transportation/parking contact message asking about its exact last departure time, mentioning the route by name.
